title: torreya maritima
intro: Torreya maritima, also known as the 'Coastal Torreya', is a small to medium-sized evergreen tree native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits associated with Torreya maritima include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Herbal preparations of Torreya maritima may include teas, infusions, or extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although proper dosing and preparation should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
